vocab.meaning: có khiếu trồng cây/mát tay nuôi cây
vocab.example: My grandmother has a real green thumb; she can make almost any withered plant flourish again.

vocab.meaning: điều kiện sinh trưởng tối ưu
vocab.example: To ensure a bountiful harvest, you must maintain optimal growing conditions regarding humidity and light.

vocab.meaning: kiến thức về thực vật học
vocab.example: While I lack formal botanical knowledge, I’ve learned through trial and error how to care for indoor lilies.
Applying a water-soluble fertilizer every fortnight can significantly boost the growth of leafy vegetables.

vocab.meaning: phát triển mạnh mẽ trong (môi trường nào đó)
vocab.example: Certain species of ferns thrive in damp, shaded areas where direct sunlight is minimal.

vocab.meaning: tình trạng rễ bám quá chặt vào chậu (do chậu quá nhỏ)
vocab.example: If a plant becomes rootbound, its growth will be stunted unless you repot it into a larger container.

vocab.meaning: sự thông thoáng/làm tơi xốp đất
vocab.example: Good soil aeration is vital because it allows oxygen to reach the roots and prevents carbon dioxide buildup.

vocab.meaning: sự phá hoại của sâu bệnh
vocab.example: Early detection of a pest infestation is key to saving your garden from complete destruction.
Wilting leaves are often a telltale sign of dehydration, though they can also indicate overwatering.

vocab.meaning: một người làm vườn say mê/nhiệt tâm
vocab.example: As an avid gardener, I spend most of my weekends tending to my backyard herb collection.
